response.justification: The role demands 8 years of C++ and deep large-scale cloud/distributed infrastructure experience, but this candidate is primarily a JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang full-stack engineer. C++ exposure is limited to one role writing C/C++ components for LabWindows/CVI and a bachelor thesis, nowhere near the required 8 years. While there is genuine distributed-systems work (DLang microservices handling high request volumes) and strong software-craftsmanship and mentoring signals, there is no evidence of cloud compute platform architecture or technical leadership at the scale required. The core technical stack mismatch outweighs the otherwise solid engineering background.
strengths: Strong software-craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, workshops, and code katas
Real distributed-systems experience with low-latency microservices at high throughput
Broad polyglot background across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
concerns: No demonstrable 8 years of C++; experience is minimal and dated
No cloud compute platform architecture or production cloud-at-scale evidence
No clear formal technical-leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform experience
